title: Joe Quenet
compiled_truth: Joe Quenet is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-29 to 2001-11-20), Joe Quenet sent 171 and received 357 emails, totalling 528 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rebecca Quenet](people/rebecca-quenet-eds) (84), [Kevino2](people/kevino2-unocal) (10), [Dmurphy](people/dmurphy-utilicorp) (10), [Knockj](people/knockj-epenergy) (8), [John Knock](people/john-knock-elpaso) (8).
